description: Questo sub-concetto distingue tra rumori brevi e intensi che interrompono bruscamente, e rumori prolungati che persistono nel tempo.
positive: A sudden clangor against my temple, a brief but searing pain, then silence.
The brief, sharp crackle against my eardrum felt like a physical blow, subito gone.
A flash of intense vibration through my foot, instantly ceasing, left me disoriented.
The immediate, brutal thump against my chest, a fleeting shock, vanished quickly.
A short, powerful pulse against my arm, a jarring sensation, abruptly ended.
The intense, momentary pressure on my back, a sharp, fleeting impact, disappeared.
A brief, powerful tremor through my hand, instantly over, leaving a residual tingle.
The immediate, sharp sting on my leg, a fleeting and intense burn, was gone.
A sudden, concentrated pressure on my forehead, a fleeting but powerful jolt.
The brief, intense vibration in my jaw, a sharp, momentary shock, quickly subsided.
A momentary, fierce pressure against my ribs, a fleeting and intense sensation.
A sharp, intense tap on my shoulder, immediately ceasing, startled me.
The brief, powerful jolt through my spine, a fleeting and intense shock.
A momentary, intense pressure on my hip, quickly vanishing.
The immediate, forceful impact against my head, a fleeting and powerful sensation.
A sharp, intense vibration on my neck, abruptly ceasing.
A fleeting, powerful pressure on my thigh, instantly gone.
The brief, intense throb in my knee, a sharp, momentary sensation.
An immediate, forceful impact on my stomach, a fleeting and powerful shock.
A sharp, intense pressure on my chin, instantly ceasing.
negative: A low hum persisted against my ear, a dull drone that faded slowly over minutes.
The constant vibration in my foot, a long, gentle tremor, gradually lessened.
A prolonged, subtle pressure against my chest, a lingering sensation, slowly eased.
A gradual fading of the buzzing in my hand, a continuous vibration diminishing.
A lingering, faint tremor through my back, a subtle sensation slowly subsiding.
The prolonged, gentle pulsing in my arm, a continuous vibration gradually lessening.
A slow, persistent pressure on my forehead, a lingering sensation slowly fading.
The continuous, low-level vibration in my jaw, gradually diminishing over time.
A prolonged, subtle pressure on my ribs, a lingering sensation slowly easing.
The gradual fading of the buzzing in my leg, a continuous vibration diminishing.
A lingering, faint tremor through my shoulder, a subtle sensation slowly subsiding.
A slow, persistent pressure on my hip, a lingering sensation slowly fading.
The continuous, low-level vibration in my spine, gradually diminishing over time.
A prolonged, gentle pulsing in my stomach, a continuous vibration gradually lessening.
A slow, persistent pressure on my neck, a lingering sensation slowly fading.
The gradual fading of the buzzing in my thigh, a continuous vibration diminishing.
A lingering, faint tremor through my knee, a subtle sensation slowly subsiding.
A slow, persistent pressure on my abdomen, a lingering sensation slowly fading.
The continuous, low-level vibration in my chin, gradually diminishing over time.
A prolonged, gentle pulsing in my ear, a continuous vibration gradually lessening.
